anxiety.recommendations: Consider therapy (CBT), breathing exercises, and consult a psychiatrist if persistent.

depression.recommendations: Regular exercise, social support, and professional counseling are key interventions.

stress.recommendations: Mindfulness, yoga, journaling, and work-life balance strategies recommended.

insomnia.recommendations: Sleep hygiene improvements, cognitive behavioral therapy for insomnia (CBT-I) is gold standard.

bipolar.recommendations: Requires professional diagnosis and long-term mood stabilizer management.
